---
title: "pilot analyses"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

theme_set(theme_bw() +
            theme(panel.grid = element_blank()))
```

```{r}
manifest <- read_csv(here("data", "assets", "manifest.csv")) |> 
  filter(task_id != "sds") |> 
  mutate(item_uid = ifelse(
    row_number() >= 241 & row_number() <= 255,
    str_c(item_uid, "b"),
    item_uid
  )) |> 
  distinct()
models <- googlesheets4::read_sheet(ss = "1T3DZzlBDuSFQrZwmby-IZ4Oi2s_7JBffQeoM1bwegJc",
                          sheet = "model_info") |> 
  write_csv(here("data", "model_info.csv"))
```

```{r}
results_files <- list.files(here("results"), 
                            pattern = "*.csv", 
                            recursive = TRUE) |> 
  str_subset("(summary|checkpoint|by-type|-de/|-es/)", negate = TRUE)

all_results <- results_files |> 
  map(\(f) {
    df <- read_csv(here("results", f), show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
        mutate(filepath = f, reason = as.character(reason))
    ns <- which(df$item_uid == "ns-num-comp-10")
    if (length(ns) == 0) return(df)
    df |> 
      mutate(item_uid = ifelse(
        row_number() > ns,
        str_c(item_uid, "b"),
        item_uid
      ))
    }) |> 
  list_rbind()

all_results_join <- all_results |> 
  mutate(model = filepath |> str_remove("/.*")) |> 
  left_join(manifest, by = join_by(item_uid)) |> 
  left_join(models, by = join_by(model)) |> 
  mutate(n_params_num = map_dbl(n_params, \(n) {
    suffix = str_sub(n, -1, -1)
    (as.numeric(str_sub(n, 1, -2)) * case_when(
      suffix == "M" ~ 10^6,
      suffix == "B" ~ 10^9,
      suffix == "T" ~ 10^12
    ))
  })) |> 
  filter(!is.na(model_name))
```

# Accuracy
```{r}
all_results_summary <- all_results_join |> 
  group_by(task, model_class, model_name, n_params_num) |> 
  summarise(accuracy = mean(is_correct),
            chance = mean(chance_level, na.rm = T),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
all_results_total <- all_results_join |> 
  group_by(model_class, model_name, n_params_num) |> 
  summarise(accuracy = mean(is_correct),
            chance = mean(chance_level, na.rm = T),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
all_results_total |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = log(n_params_num), y = accuracy, col = model_class)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point()
```

```{r}
gpt_results <- all_results_summary |> 
  filter(model_name == "GPT 5.3") |> 
  arrange(desc(accuracy))

all_results_summary |> 
  mutate(task = fct_relevel(task, gpt_results$task)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = log(n_params_num), y = accuracy)) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = "none"), 
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ log(x),
              lty = "dashed", se = F, col = "black") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = chance), lty = "dotted", col = "grey54") +
  geom_line(aes(col = model_class)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = model_class)) +
  facet_wrap(~ task) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Log parameters",
       y = "Accuracy",
       col = "Model class")
```

# Item parameters
```{r}
item_params <- list.files(here("data", "responses", "2026-04-08", "irt_models"),
                          pattern = "_item_params.csv",
                          full.names = T) |> 
  map(\(f) read_csv(f, show_col_types = F)) |> 
  list_rbind() |> 
  mutate(task_id = str_remove(item_uid, "_.*"),
         item_uid = str_replace(item_uid, "_word_", "__"),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "mrot", str_remove(item_uid, "-.*"), item_uid),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "tom", str_remove(item_uid, "story[0-9]_"), item_uid),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "tom", str_replace(item_uid, "-2", "_"), item_uid)) |> 
  distinct()
```

```{r}
all_results_difficulty <- all_results_join |> 
  mutate(item_uid_orig = item_uid,
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "mrot", str_remove(item_uid, "(?<=[0-9]{3})_.*"), item_uid)) |> 
  left_join(item_params, by = join_by(task_id, item_uid)) |> 
  mutate(is_correct = as.numeric(is_correct))
```

```{r}
all_results_difficulty |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = difficulty, y = is_correct, col = model_name)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .01) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = model_name), 
              method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
              se = F) +
  facet_wrap(~ task) +
  labs(x = "Difficulty",
       y = "Accuracy",
       col = "Model")
```

```{r}
cor_results <- all_results_difficulty |> 
  group_by(task, model_name, model_class, n_params_num) |> 
  summarise(cor = cor(is_correct, difficulty, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
cor_results |> 
  mutate(task = fct_relevel(task, gpt_results$task)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = log(n_params_num), y = cor)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = "dotted", col = "grey54") +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = "none"), 
              method = "lm", formula = y ~ log(x),
              lty = "dashed", se = F, col = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(col = model_class)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = model_class)) +
  facet_wrap(~ task) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-.5, .5)) +
  labs(x = "Log parameters",
       y = "Accuracy-item difficulty correlation",
       col = "Model class")
```

# Task difficulty
Recover run_id to user_id mapping
```{r}
id_link <- list.files(here("data", "responses", "2026-04-08", "tasks"),
                             pattern = "_trials.csv",
                             full.names = T) |> 
  map(\(f) {
    read_csv(f, show_col_types = F) |> 
      select(task = task_id, user_id, run_id) |> 
      distinct()
  }) |> 
  list_rbind()
```

First, estimate performance for all participants
```{r}
ability_groups <- list.files(here("data", "responses", "2026-04-08", "irt_models"),
                             pattern = ".rds",
                             full.names = T) |> 
  map(\(f) {
    model = readRDS(f)
    tibble(group = model@groups) |> 
      cbind(model@scores) |> 
      mutate(task = str_remove(f, ".*/") |> str_remove(".rds"))
  }) |> 
  list_rbind()

full_item_params <- list.files(here("data", "responses", "2026-04-08", "irt_models"),
                             pattern = ".rds",
                             full.names = T) |> 
  map(\(f) (readRDS(f))@model_vals |> 
        mutate(task = str_remove(f, ".*/") |> str_remove(".rds"),
               item = str_remove(item, "-1$"))) |> 
  list_rbind() |> 
  select(group, task, item, name, value) |> 
  filter(item != "GROUP") |> 
  rename(item_uid = item) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "name",
              values_from = "value") |> 
  mutate(task_id = str_remove(item_uid, "_.*"),
         item_uid = str_replace(item_uid, "_word_", "__"),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "mrot", str_remove(item_uid, "-.*"), item_uid),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "tom", str_remove(item_uid, "story[0-9]_"), item_uid),
         item_uid = ifelse(task_id == "tom", str_replace(item_uid, "-2", "_"), item_uid)) |> 
  distinct()
```

```{r}
item_by_group <- full_item_params |> 
  nest(items = -c(group, task)) |> 
  left_join(ability_groups |> 
              nest(abilities = -c(group, task)),
            by = join_by(group, task))
```

```{r}
calc_prob_4pl <- function(theta, a1, d, g, u) {
  b <- d / a1
  g + (u - g) / (1 + exp(-a1 * (theta - b)))
}

included_items <- all_results_difficulty |> 
  distinct(item_uid) |> 
  pull(item_uid)

item_by_group_cross <- item_by_group |> 
  mutate(est_scores = map2(items, abilities, \(it, ab) {
    full_data <- cross_join(it, ab) |> 
      filter(item_uid %in% included_items) |> 
      mutate(prob = pmap_dbl(list(ability, a1, d, g, u), calc_prob_4pl))
  }))

est_sumscores <- item_by_group_cross |> 
  mutate(sumscores = map(est_scores, \(s) {
    s |> group_by(run_id) |> 
      summarise(sumscore = sum(prob),
                n_trials = n(),
                accuracy = sumscore / n_trials)
  })) |> 
  select(group, task, sumscores) |> 
  unnest(sumscores) |> 
  left_join(ability_groups, by = join_by(group, task, run_id)) |> 
  left_join(id_link, by = join_by(task, run_id))
```

```{r}
est_sumscores |> 
  mutate(task = fct_reorder(task, accuracy)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = task, y = accuracy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .05, position = position_jitter(width = .4, seed = 123)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = model_name), data = all_results_summary) +
  geom_line(aes(col = model_name, group = model_name), data = all_results_summary) +
  labs(x = "Task", y = "Accuracy")
```

```{r}
est_sumscores |> 
  group_by(user_id, task) |> 
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |> 
  summarise(n = n()) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = n)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  labs(x = "Number of tasks", y = "Count")
```

```{r}
human_est <- est_sumscores |> 
  group_by(task) |> 
  summarise(accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = T))
```

```{r}
p_task <- all_results_summary |> 
  left_join(human_est |> rename(human_accuracy = accuracy), by = join_by(task)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = human_accuracy, y = accuracy, col = model_name)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, lty = "dashed", col = "grey54") +
  geom_point(aes(shape = task)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) +
  # geom_line() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Human task accuracy", y = "Model task accuracy",
       col = "Model", shape = "Task") +
  theme(legend.box = "horizontal")

p_task
```

```{r}
p_task_rank <- all_results_summary |> 
  bind_rows(human_est |> mutate(model_name = "Human")) |> 
  group_by(model_name) |> 
  arrange(desc(accuracy)) |> 
  mutate(task_rank = row_number()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(model_name = factor(model_name) |> fct_reorder(accuracy) |> fct_relevel("Human") |> fct_rev(),
         task = factor(task, levels = human_est |> arrange(desc(accuracy)) |> pull(task))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = task, y = model_name, fill = task_rank)) +
  geom_tile() +
  labs(x = "Task", y = "Model", fill = "Task rank")
p_task_rank
```
